common.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?

landing.heroSubtitle: Engage your audience with live quizzes. Real-time responses, instant leaderboards, and gamified learning experiences.

feature.realTimeDesc: See responses as they come in. Live countdowns and instant feedback keep everyone engaged.
feature.leaderboardDesc: Automatic scoring and rankings. Celebrate top performers with live leaderboard updates.
feature.analyticsDesc: Track participation, analyze performance, and review quiz history with detailed stats.
feature.easyDesc: Build quizzes in minutes. Simple room codes for joining. No complex setup required.
feature.typesDesc: Support for text and image questions. Single or multiple choice answers.
feature.flexDesc: Customize time limits, scoring modes, question order, and feedback timing.

about.title: About QuizFlow
about.subtitle: Real-time interactive quiz platform
about.missionText: QuizFlow was built to make interactive learning and engagement simple and fun. Whether you're a teacher, trainer, or event host, our platform gives you the tools to create live quiz experiences that captivate your audience.
about.feature1: Real-time quiz sessions with instant leaderboards
about.feature2: Multiple question types — text and image
about.feature3: Flexible scoring modes and time limits

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: January 2026
privacy.section1Text: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, and quiz data. We also collect usage data to improve our service.
privacy.section2Text: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve QuizFlow, to process transactions, and to send you technical notices and support messages.
privacy.section3Text: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.section4Text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@quizflow.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Last updated: January 2026
terms.section1Text: By accessing or using QuizFlow, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.
terms.section2Text: You may use QuizFlow only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You agree not to use the service in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations.
terms.section3Text: The service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by QuizFlow and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
terms.section4Text: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account at our sole discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Service.
